svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 07 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 07: Learning Logbook Prototype MVP and MVP Types Map.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 07 Reference Images
Not only run experiments — preserve the learning.
A Logbook records: hypothesis → experiment design →
Eight MVP types, each testing a different assumption:
Landing Page · Concierge MVP · Wizard-of-Oz · Fake Door
Paid Pilot · Demo-first · Spreadsheet MVP · Community-first
• The purpose of an MVP is not launch — it is learning
• Prototype, MVP, Product, and Business are not the same thing
• During the test: watch behaviour, not compliments
• Success and failure criteria must be written before the test
• Build-Measure-Learn: not a loop, but less self-deception each round
Rule: A good MVP is not the smallest product. It is the cheapest
credible way to learn the thing that matters most.
